name: assignment
kpi: Verify constructive alignment with module learning outcomes
Ensure assessment targets higher-order thinking (Bloom's Taxonomy)
Check for practical application and real-world employability skills
Assess clarity of feedback opportunities and practice exercises
instruction: Analyze the uploaded assignment brief. Ensure it constructively aligns with the module's learning outcomes. Evaluate the cognitive complexity to ensure it tests higher-order thinking rather than just rote memorization. Verify that the task reflects current industry practices and promotes employability skills.
